td.style: font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 300;

span.style: position: relative; display: block; top: 50%; left: 0; width: 100%; border-top: 1px solid #d7dfe3; content: ''; transition-property: opacity; transition-duration: .25s; z-index: -1; position: absolute;opacity:1;

t.div:
Private Jet:
From/To:
Flight:
Class:
Departure:
Arrival:
Bag:
Terminal:
Number of Person:
>

t.t-if: os.date_from and os.date_to and not service_dates_called
